records.m_Talk_ENG: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that's left is to secure the time coordinates with the Periscope, sync it with the Fishing Rod, and pull Paradox out from there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that's left is to secure the time coordinates with the Periscope, sync it with the Fishing Rod, and pull Paradox out from there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that's left is to secure the time coordinates with the Periscope, sync it with the Fishing Rod, and pull Paradox out from there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will have to wait a little longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will have to wait a little longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will have to wait a little longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No energy signals that can be used as coordinates have been observed yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No energy signals that can be used as coordinates have been observed yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No energy signals that can be used as coordinates have been observed yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. The transmission signal is suddenly unstable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. The transmission signal is suddenly unstable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. The transmission signal is suddenly unstable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The satellite isn't picking up on any Corruption storms... Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The satellite isn't picking up on any Corruption storms... Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The satellite isn't picking up on any Corruption storms... Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Watch out! There are a lot of
8g headed
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Watch out! There are a lot of
8g headed
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Watch out! There are a lot of
8g headed
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Comms have been cut off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Comms have been cut off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Comms have been cut off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said it wasn't a Corruption storm. Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said it wasn't a Corruption storm. Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said it wasn't a Corruption storm. Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It means that someone has come to stop us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It means that someone has come to stop us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It means that someone has come to stop us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Above us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Above us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Above us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator! This way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator! This way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator! This way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you. That almost hit me right on my head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you. That almost hit me right on my head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you. That almost hit me right on my head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that? It was the size of a basketball.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that? It was the size of a basketball.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that? It was the size of a basketball.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It quickly seeped into the ground, so I couldn't get a clear view of it, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It quickly seeped into the ground, so I couldn't get a clear view of it, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It quickly seeped into the ground, so I couldn't get a clear view of it, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...it seems like a type of Corrupted Tumor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...it seems like a type of Corrupted Tumor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...it seems like a type of Corrupted Tumor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ground is turning black.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ground is turning black.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ground is turning black.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never studied Corruption, but won't it be dangerous for us to stay above it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never studied Corruption, but won't it be dangerous for us to stay above it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never studied Corruption, but won't it be dangerous for us to stay above it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't good. If I leave the Periscope's range of motion, the Fishing Rod connected to the Well will stop working as Well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't good. If I leave the Periscope's range of motion, the Fishing Rod connected to the Well will stop working as Well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't good. If I leave the Periscope's range of motion, the Fishing Rod connected to the Well will stop working as Well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, we won't be there to rescue Paradox at the right time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, we won't be there to rescue Paradox at the right time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, we won't be there to rescue Paradox at the right time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmpf!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmpf!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmpf!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it'll be safe now, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it'll be safe now, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it'll be safe now, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A bullet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A bullet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A bullet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It broke through the ice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It broke through the ice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It broke through the ice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you help me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you help me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you help me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try my best to stop them, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try my best to stop them, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try my best to stop them, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're... back here again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're... back here again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're... back here again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm ready, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm ready, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm ready, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be running into that thing again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be running into that thing again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be running into that thing again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I must endure it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I must endure it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I must endure it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I want to protect...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I want to protect...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I want to protect...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't looking good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't looking good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't looking good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Felix...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Felix...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Felix...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds plausible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds plausible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds plausible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A gift...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A gift...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A gift...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yanikka Shirokova.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yanikka Shirokova.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yanikka Shirokova.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Yanikka...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Yanikka...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Yanikka...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't this all sound familiar?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't this all sound familiar?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't this all sound familiar?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf? What does that mean...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf? What does that mean...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf? What does that mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are those monsters...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are those monsters...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are those monsters...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chernobog.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chernobog.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chernobog.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Brecht, be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Brecht, be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Brecht, be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Fishing Rod has been successfully connected to the Well.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, we won't be there to rescue Paradox at the right time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, we won't be there to rescue Paradox at the right time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmpf!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmpf!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmpf!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima just froze the entire ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it'll be safe now, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it'll be safe now, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it'll be safe now, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I hear something boiling underneath us...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A bullet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A bullet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A bullet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It broke through the ice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It broke through the ice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It broke through the ice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those... are the Northern Union soldiers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Making an army appear from out of nowhere. The Northern Union's technology is definitely unique.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those people... I can't hear them breathe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And they look different from the regular soldiers we saw before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to ask, but I will need some uninterrupted time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you help me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you help me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you help me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try my best to stop them, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try my best to stop them, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try my best to stop them, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: if our situation worsens, I will prioritize your evacuation, Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're... back here again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're... back here again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're... back here again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm ready, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm ready, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm ready, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be running into that thing again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be running into that thing again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be running into that thing again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I smell it again... Mother's floral scent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's getting stronger the closer I get to the inner yard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I'd be lying if I said I wasn't scared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I might even have doubts again... upon hearing Mother's voice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I must endure it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I must endure it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I must endure it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I want to protect...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I want to protect...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I want to protect...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...the preciousness of the future that I learned from Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't looking good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't looking good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't looking good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their numbers aren't decreasing at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it doesn't feel like I defeated them... because they melt like marshmallows whenever I attack one of them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be at a disadvantage if this attrition warfare continues.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They have us surrounded and they're pressuring us with only the minimum number of units necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if... they have no intention of defeating us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our objective is not taking you down, but keeping you tied up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Felix...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Felix...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Felix...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you only help us so that you could stab us in the back like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had no choice. I have to follow orders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Intel about two of the Administration's strongest Artifacts being here reached the higher-ups, you see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. How did the Northern Union get that information...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How do you think? Maybe you have a leak inside the organization.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You tricked us. That's a shallow tactic that doesn't befit your reputation as a hero, Felix.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. Didn't I already give you enough reason to doubt that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even Chamber's Senior was conspiring with us behind your backs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds plausible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds plausible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds plausible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what was Jackson cooperating on with you exactly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't listen to them, Administrator. They are just trying to get in our heads.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Jackson was an ardent supporter of the Veritas Research Department. We made significant progress thanks to his support.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And as a token of our gratitude, we gifted him one of our successful works...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you already know who I'm talking about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A gift...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A gift...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A gift...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yanikka Shirokova.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yanikka Shirokova.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yanikka Shirokova.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Yanikka...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Yanikka...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Yanikka...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is... the gift from the Northern Union...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is the result of our research on the Pale Moon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you meaning to say that you handed over such an important result to someone of the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because the sun makes the moon shine, that doesn't mean that the sun will lose its shine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union's technological capabilities do not exist to merely create that one child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that one child becomes an obstacle in your path?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, retribution is merely a byproduct we must endure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't this all sound familiar?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't this all sound familiar?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't this all sound familiar?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you'd understand, given that you sacrificed everything for one wolf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf? What does that mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf? What does that mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf? What does that mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are those monsters...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are those monsters...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are those monsters...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow that was with the Northern Union.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It targeted C.O.s last time, but it will come after us this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are two of them this time. And I thought one was enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chernobog.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chernobog.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chernobog.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are Brothers... molded with the obsession of their unquestioned loyalty to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We lack tactical data on them since they are prototypes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, we're going to test them on you. You don't mind, do you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Brecht, be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Brecht, be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Brecht, be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their human form is just a shell. You don't know when it will change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima, you be careful too.
